name: topicTagAgent
title: Topic Tag Agent
description: Subscribes ARTICLE_SUBMITTED. Loads the topic-taxonomy skill, classifies the article along the canonical taxonomy, and extracts named entities. Emits ARTICLE_TAGGED carrying the original article text plus the tagging payload so downstream agents have full context.

actions.name: tagArticle
actions.description: Classify the article and extract entities. Emit ARTICLE_TAGGED with the merged payload.

name: claimExtractAgent
title: Claim Extract Agent
description: Subscribes ARTICLE_TAGGED. Loads the claim-extraction skill, identifies 3–7 consequential factual claims with confidence + verification queries, and emits CLAIMS_EXTRACTED with the merged context.

tool_use.name: skills.load_skill
tool_use.description: Load 'claim-extraction' for the confidence ladder + schema.

actions.name: extractClaims
actions.description: Extract claims with confidence and verification queries. Emit CLAIMS_EXTRACTED.

name: briefAgent
title: Brief Agent
description: Subscribes CLAIMS_EXTRACTED. Loads the brief-template skill, assembles a self-contained HTML analyst brief, persists it via writeBriefToDisk, and emits BRIEF_GENERATED with the file path.

tool_use.name: writeBriefToDisk
tool_use.description: Persist the assembled HTML brief to data/briefs/<tenant>/<briefId>.html.

actions.name: buildBrief
actions.description: Assemble the HTML brief from the upstream payload, persist, emit BRIEF_GENERATED.
